news.t: Gold and Silver Price Forecast – Fed Hawkish Signal Pressures Metals
Gold Falls as Hawkish Fed Outweighs U.S.-Iran Deal Relief
Wall Street bears back in control after the Fed's hawkish outlook, Main Street leans bullish despite gold's backslide to $4,200/oz
Gold (XAU/USD) Price Forecast: Can Bulls Defend Fibonacci Support?
Hawkish Fed could push gold prices back to $4,000 next week
Gold, Silver, Platinum Forecasts – Gold Retreats As Dollar Tests Yearly Highs
Gold And Silver Futures Fall As Fed Indicates Future Hikes
Gold Price Analysis – Gold Markets Drop Heading to a Holiday Session
Spot gold at $4,250/oz after U.S. weekly jobless claims dip to 226k
Gold (XAUUSD) & Silver Price Forecast: Ceasefire Holds Amid Iran-Israel Tensions — XAU Dips to $4,275, XAG at $68?

overview.description: The Invesco DB Precious Metals Fund (DBP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DBIQ Optimum Yield Precious Metals index. The fund tracks an index of gold and silver futures contracts. It optimizes its contract selection based on the shape of the futures curve to minimize contango. DBP was launched on Jan 5, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: DBIQ Optimum Yield Precious Metals Index

data.title: Gold and Silver Price Forecast – Fed Hawkish Signal Pressures Metals
data.text: Gold and silver remain under pressure as the Fed's hawkish signal supports the US dollar and Treasury yields, while the US-Iran peace agreement may limit downside risks.

data.title: Gold Falls as Hawkish Fed Outweighs U.S.-Iran Deal Relief
data.text: Gold fell in early Asian trade. The precious metal's price is being weighed down by a more hawkish Fed outweighing relief from the U.S.-Iran interim peace deal, ANZ said.
